subcodes.first_line: O remnant of the Family of God upon earth, and lingering fragrance from the celestial Ridván, and inscribed Word [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا بقیه آل الله فی الارض و نفحه الباقیه من رضوان القدس و کلمه المسطوره من
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @chastisement and requital, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
